content.thinking:
The finding is about a fabrication in s1 - the opening sentence "Nablarch 5のリリース一覧。" doesn't appear in the source. I need to remove this sentence from the beginning of the s1 section content.

The fix is simple: remove "Nablarch 5のリリース一覧。" from the start of sections.s1.
